methodology_sections: 1. Conservation Laws - Solvency, inflation checks, supply integrity
2. Relationship & Ratio Invariants - Collateralization, rate consistency
3. Economic Monotonicity - Yield accumulation, exchange rate direction
4. Incentive & Game Theoretic Integrity - Attack cost vs profit, slashing
5. Fee & Yield Consistency - Fee accounting, yield distribution

invariants.description: A plot's occupancy status must perfectly synchronize with the toiler state of the NFT occupying it.
invariants.attack_scenario: In transferToUnoccupiedPlot, toilerState[tokenId].plotId is not updated. This desync causes unstakeMunchable to clear the old plot's occupancy (which is already empty) and leaves the new plot permanently marked as occupied, bricking the plot forever.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_plot_occupancy_sync(address landlord, uint256 plotId) public view { if(plotOccupied[landlord][plotId].occupied) { assert(toilerState[plotOccupied[landlord][plotId].tokenId].plotId == plotId); } }

invariants.description: Yield must only accrue on plots that are economically backed by the landlord's locked value.
invariants.attack_scenario: Landlords withdraw locked assets, reducing their valid plot count. Due to an off-by-one error (_getNumPlots < plotId instead of <=), renters on the exact boundary plot continue to earn unbacked yield indefinitely, inflating the reward supply.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_backed_yield(uint256 tokenId) public view { if(toilerState[tokenId].plotId >= _getNumPlots(toilerState[tokenId].landlord)) { assert(toilerState[tokenId].dirty == true); } }

invariants.description: The total unfed Schnibbles for a user must never decrease as a result of farming (Yield Monotonicity).
invariants.attack_scenario: If realm and rarity bonuses sum to less than -100, the yield multiplier becomes negative. Casting this negative int256 to uint256 causes a massive underflow, granting the user near-infinite Schnibbles and destroying the game's economy.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_yield_monotonicity(uint256 preBalance, uint256 postBalance) public pure { assert(postBalance >= preBalance); }

invariants.description: The tax rate applied to a toiler must never exceed 100% (1e18), ensuring the renter's yield calculation does not underflow.
invariants.attack_scenario: If a landlord can set a tax rate > 1e18, schnibblesTotal - schnibblesLandlord will underflow and revert _farmPlots. Since unstakeMunchable calls forceFarmPlots, the renter's NFT becomes permanently locked in the contract.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_max_tax_rate(uint256 tokenId) public view { assert(toilerState[tokenId].latestTaxRate <= 1e18); }

invariants.description: The total Schnibbles minted during a farming session must exactly equal the sum of the renter's share and the landlord's tax share.
invariants.attack_scenario: Rounding errors or malicious tax rates could cause the protocol to distribute more or less yield than was actually generated, violating value conservation and leading to hidden inflation or yield theft.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_yield_conservation(uint256 schnibblesTotal, uint256 schnibblesLandlord, uint256 renterSchnibbles) public pure { assert(schnibblesTotal == renterSchnibbles + schnibblesLandlord); }
